description: Dual-case context budget test cases for OREV/EYAL. These 9 questions all require pages from 2+ different case documents but context budget currently drops one. Fix: detect 2+ case IDs in query via regex [A-Z]{2,3} \d{3}/\d{4} and guarantee 1 page per referenced case regardless of scorer rank.
expected_total_gain: +7-9 G-score points on 100 warmup questions => avg G rises from 46.8% to ~55%

test_cases.question: Do cases CA 004/2025 and SCT 295/2025 involve any of the same legal entities or individuals as parties?

documents_required.reason: Title page with party names for CA 004/2025

test_cases.fix_required: Guarantee both case title pages in context when query contains CA 004/2025 AND SCT 295/2025
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in context_page_ids for this query

test_cases.question: Is there any main party that appeared in both cases CFI 010/2024 and ENF 053/2025 at any point?
test_cases.fix_required: Guarantee both case pages in context when query contains CFI 010/2024 AND ENF 053/2025
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in context_page_ids for this query

test_cases.question: Was the same judge involved in both case CFI 010/2024 and case DEC 001/2025 at any point?
test_cases.fix_required: Guarantee both case judge pages in context when query contains CFI 010/2024 AND DEC 001/2025
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in context_page_ids for this query

test_cases.question: Did cases DEC 001/2025 and CFI 057/2025 have any judges in common at any point?

documents_required.reason: Judge page for CFI 057/2025 (same doc hash, different page — same document covers both cases)

test_cases.note: SPECIAL: both gold pages come from same document hash but different pages. Issue is multi-page inclusion from same doc, not cross-doc. Context budget may need to guarantee TOP-2 pages from queried case docs, not just 1.
test_cases.fix_required: Guarantee pages 20 AND 21 of DEC 001/2025 doc are both included in context
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: doc_hash 3f8a5ea0...21 AND 3f8a5ea0...20 both in context_page_ids

test_cases.question: Do cases DEC 001/2025 and SCT 514/2025 involve any of the same legal entities or individuals as main parties at any point?
test_cases.fix_required: Guarantee both case pages in context when query contains DEC 001/2025 AND SCT 514/2025
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in context_page_ids for this query

test_cases.question: Was the same judge involved in both case DEC 001/2025 and case TCD 001/2024 at any point?
test_cases.fix_required: Guarantee both case judge pages in context when query contains DEC 001/2025 AND TCD 001/2024
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in context_page_ids for this query

test_cases.question: Was the same judge involved in both case CA 005/2025 and case TCD 001/2024 at any point?
test_cases.fix_required: Guarantee both case judge pages in context when query contains CA 005/2025 AND TCD 001/2024
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in context_page_ids for this query

test_cases.question: Does the term 'Law' in the Strata Title Regulations refer to the same law number as the 'Employment Law' mentioned in the Employment Regulations?
test_cases.note: No case IDs — this is a cross-regulation comparison, different fix path. Requires both Strata Title Regulations AND Employment Regulations to be in context simultaneously.

documents_required.reason: Definition of 'Law' in Strata Title Regulations
Definition of 'Employment Law' in Employment Regulations

test_cases.fix_required: Cross-regulation comparison: guarantee both regulation docs in context. Detect 'Strata Title Regulations' AND 'Employment Regulations' in query → include title pages of both.
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in context_page_ids for this query

test_cases.question: Is there any party (claimant or defendant) common to both case TCD 001/2024 and case CFI 016/2025 at any point?
test_cases.note: RETRIEVAL miss, not just context miss — gold page not even in retrieved_page_ids. Fix requires either: (1) retrieval expansion, or (2) dedicated retrieval for each case ID detected in query.
test_cases.fix_required: For each case ID in query, run a targeted retrieval for that case's title page. CFI 016/2025 title page (6248961b...4) currently not retrieved.
test_cases.test_assertion: After fix: both doc hashes must appear in retrieved_page_ids AND context_page_ids

summary.detection_rule: regex match [A-Z]{2,3} \d{3}/\d{4} in query → count matches → if 2+ distinct case IDs found, activate dual-case context guarantee
summary.implementation_note: fba6e86a is a special case: both gold pages are from the SAME document (DEC 001/2025 doc) but different pages (20 and 21). The fix for this one is not cross-doc but cross-page within same doc — guarantee top-2 pages from each detected case document.
summary.regression_risk: Low. This is an additive routing rule. No existing correct answers are affected — only questions with 2+ case IDs get expanded context budget. Worst case: slightly higher latency from expanded context for ~15-20% of questions.
